channel.title: 成长 on changcui
channel.description: Recent content in 成长 on changcui

item.title: 字符流中第一个不重复的字符
item.description: // 思路一：储存初次出现的下标，遍历整个数组，寻找最小下标，空间复杂度O(k)，时间复杂度O(k) class Solution { public: vector<int> c; int cnt; void Insert(char ch) { if (c.empty()) c.resize(256, INT_MAX), cnt = 0; c[ch] = c[ch] == INT_MAX ? cnt : -1; cnt++; } //return the first appearence once char in current stringstream char FirstAppearingOnce() { char rtn = '#'; int idx = INT_MAX; for (int i = 0; i < 256; i++) { if (c[i] != -1 && c[i] < idx) rtn = i, idx = c[i]; } return rtn; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：488k

item.title: 表示数值的字符串
item.description: // 思路一：拆分成三部分去 check class Solution { public: bool isInt(string s) { if (s.empty()) return false; if (s.size() == 1 && (s[0] == '+' || s[0] == '-')) return true; if (!isdigit(s[0]) && s[0] != '+' && s[0] != '-') return false; for (auto i = 1; i < s.size(); i++) { if (!isdigit(s[i])) return false; } return true; } bool isFloat(string s) { auto p = s.find('.'); if (p != std::string::npos) { return isInt(s.

item.title: 正则表达式匹配
item.description: // 思路一：按照 pattern 下一位是不是 * 来分情况考虑，如果是 * 的话，可以使用，也可以不使用，分两种情况返回。 class Solution { public: int sl, pl; bool match(char* str, char* pattern) { sl = strlen(str), pl = strlen(pattern); return helper(str, pattern, 0, 0); } bool helper(char* str, char* pattern, int i, int j) { if (i == sl && j == pl) return true; if (j == pl) return false; if (j + 1 < pl && pattern[j+1] == '*') { if (i < sl && (str[i] == pattern[j] || pattern[j] == '.

item.title: 构建乘积数组
item.description: // 思路一：将数组 B 分为两段递推求解 class Solution { public: vector<int> multiply(const vector<int>& A) { vector<int> b, c{1}, d{1}; int n = A.size(); if (n == 0) return b; for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) { c.push_back(c.back() * A[i]); d.push_back(d.back() * A[n - 1 - i]); } for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { b.push_back(c[i] * d[n - 1 - i]); } return b; } }; // 运行时间：4ms // 占用内存：480k // 思路二：优化空间 class Solution { public: vector<int> multiply(const vector<int>& A) { int n = A.

item.title: 数组中重复的数字
item.description: // 思路一：使用 set 保存数字 class Solution { public: bool duplicate(int numbers[], int length, int* duplication) { unordered_set<int> s; for (int i = 0; i < length; i++) { if (s.count(numbers[i])) { *duplication = numbers[i]; return true; } s.insert(numbers[i]); } return false; } }; // 运行时间：4ms // 占用内存：492k // 思路二：每个元素都应该在它下标的位置 class Solution { public: bool duplicate(int numbers[], int length, int* duplication) { for (int i = 0; i < length; i++) { while (numbers[i] !

item.title: 把字符串转换成整数
item.description: // 思路一：使用 long long 处理范围问题 class Solution { public: int StrToInt(string str) { if (str.size() == 0) return 0; int mul = str[0] == '-' ? -1 : 1; long long rtn = isdigit(str[0]) ? str[0] - '0' : 0; for (int i = 1; i < str.size(); i++) { if (!isdigit(str[i])) return 0; rtn = 10 * rtn + str[i] - '0'; } rtn *= mul; return rtn >= INT_MIN && rtn <= INT_MAX ?

item.title: 不用加减乘除做加法
item.description: // 思路一：位运算，保证两者和不变，num1 作为各位相加的结果，num2 作为进位的结果，当 num2 为0时，num1 就可返回 class Solution { public: int Add(int num1, int num2) { while (num2) { auto t = num1 ^ num2; num2 = (num1 & num2) << 1; num1 = t; } return num1; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：488k

item.title: 求1+2+3+...+n
item.description: // 思路一：使用递归代替循环，使用短路代替 if class Solution { public: int Sum_Solution(int n) { int rtn = n; rtn && (rtn += Sum_Solution(n - 1)); return rtn; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：484k

item.title: 孩子们的游戏(圆圈中最后剩下的数)
item.description: // 思路一：直接模拟 class Solution { public: int LastRemaining_Solution(int n, int m) { vector<int> c(n, 0); int i = -1, j = 0, cnt = n; while (cnt) { i++; if (i == n) i = 0; if (c[i]) continue; if (j == m - 1) { c[i] = 1; cnt--; j = 0; } else j++; } return i - 1; } }; // 运行时间：107ms // 占用内存：500k // 思路二：寻找数学规律 // http://zhedahht.

item.title: 扑克牌顺子
item.description: // 思路一：失败的条件是有非零重复值，或者最大值减去非零最小值大于4 class Solution { public: bool IsContinuous(vector<int> numbers) { if (numbers.size() == 0) return false; int min_ = 14, max_ = -1; unordered_set<int> s; for (auto i : numbers) { if (i && s.count(i)) return false; s.insert(i); if (i) min_ = min(min_, i); max_ = max(max_, i); } return max_ - min_ < 5; } }; // 运行时间：2ms // 占用内存：504k

item.title: 翻转单词顺序列
item.description: // 思路一：先翻转字符串，再按照 word 翻转 class Solution { public: string ReverseSentence(string str) { if (str.size() == 0) return str; reverse(str.begin(), str.end()); for (int i = 0; i < str.size();) { int end = i; while (end < str.size() && str[end] != ' ') end++; reverse(str.begin()+i, str.begin()+end); while (end < str.size() && str[end] == ' ') end++; if (end < str.size()) i = end; else break； } return str; } }; // 运行时间：4ms // 占用内存：592k

item.title: 左旋转字符串
item.description: // 思路一：左删除右添加 class Solution { public: string LeftRotateString(string str, int n) { if (str.size() == 0) return str; n = n % str.size(); while (n--) { char a = str[0]; str.erase(str.begin()); str += a; } return str; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：480k // 思路二：先反转字符串，然后反转前半部分，再反转后半部分，(AB)T = BTAT class Solution { public: string LeftRotateString(string str, int n) { if (str.size() == 0) return str; n = n % str.size(); reverse(str.begin(), str.end()); reverse(str.

item.title: 和为S的两个数字
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<int> FindNumbersWithSum(vector<int> array,int sum) { int i = 0, j = array.size() - 1; while (i < j) { int s = array[i] + array[j]; if (s == sum) return {array[i], array[j]}; else if (s < sum) i++; else j--; } return {}; } }; // 运行时间：6ms // 占用内存：504k

item.title: 和为S的连续正数序列
item.description: // 思路一：数学法，找规律，分成奇偶两种情况，判断边界条件 class Solution { public: vector<vector<int> > FindContinuousSequence(int sum) { vector<vector<int> > result; for (int i = sqrt(sum * 2); i >= 2; i--) { if (i & 1 && sum % i == 0 && (sum / i - (i - 1)/2) > 0) { vector<int> output; int begin = sum / i - (i - 1) / 2; while (begin <= sum / i + (i - 1)/2) output.

item.title: 数组中只出现一次的数字
item.description: // 思路一：使用 map 保存数字，移除数字 class Solution { public: void FindNumsAppearOnce(vector<int> data,int* num1,int *num2) { unordered_map<int, int> m; for (auto i : data) { if (m.count(i)) m.erase(i); else m[i] = 1; } auto p = m.begin(); *num1 = p++->first; *num2 = p->first; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：484k // 思路二：全部异或得到两个数的异或，再按照最右的1把所有数分为两部分异或，分别得到两个数 class Solution { public: void FindNumsAppearOnce(vector<int> data,int* num1,int *num2) { int xorr = 0, flag = 1; for (auto i : data) xorr ^= i; while (!

item.title: 平衡二叉树
item.description: // 思路一：平衡二叉树的定义，空树或者左右子树是平衡二叉树且高度差不大于1 class Solution { public: int depth(TreeNode* root) { if (!root) return 0; return 1 + max(depth(root->left), depth(root->right)); } bool IsBalanced_Solution(TreeNode* pRoot) { if (!pRoot) return true; return IsBalanced_Solution(pRoot->left) && IsBalanced_Solution(pRoot->right) && abs(depth(pRoot->left) - depth(pRoot->right)) <= 1; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：480k

item.title: 二叉树的深度
item.description: class Solution { public: int TreeDepth(TreeNode* pRoot) { if (!pRoot) return 0; return 1 + max(TreeDepth(pRoot->left), TreeDepth(pRoot->right)); } }; // 运行时间：4ms // 占用内存：464k

item.title: 数字在排序数组中出现的次数
item.description: // 思路一：直接遍历查找 class Solution { public: int GetNumberOfK(vector<int> data ,int k) { int cnt = 0; for (auto i : data) cnt += k == i; return cnt; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：484k // 思路二：二分查找 class Solution { public: int GetNumberOfK(vector<int> data ,int k) { int cnt = 0; int l = 0, r = data.size() - 1; while (l <= r) { int mid = l + (r - l) / 2; if (k == data[mid]) { int i = mid; while (data[i++] == k) cnt++; i = mid - 1; while (data[i--] == k) cnt++; return cnt; } else if (k > data[mid]) l = mid + 1; else r = mid - 1; } return cnt; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：492k // 思路三：STL 大法 class Solution { public: int GetNumberOfK(vector<int> data ,int k) { auto range = equal_range(data.

item.title: 数组中的逆序对
item.description: // 思路一：归并排序求逆序对 class Solution { public: long long sort(vector<int>& data, int l, int r) { if (l >= r) return 0; int mid = l + (r - l) / 2; long long lc = sort(data, l, mid); long long rc = sort(data, mid+1, r); long long rtn = lc + rc; vector<int> tmp(r-l+1, 0); int i = l, j = mid + 1, k = 0; while (i <= mid && j <= r) { if (data[i] > data[j]) { tmp[k++] = data[j++]; rtn += mid - i + 1; } else tmp[k++] = data[i++]; } while (i <= mid) tmp[k++] = data[i++]; while (j <= r) tmp[k++] = data[j++]; for (int m = l; m <= r; m++) data[m] = tmp[m-l]; return rtn; } int InversePairs(vector<int> data) { long long result = sort(data, 0, data.

item.title: 第一个只出现一次的字符
item.description: // 思路一：两次遍历，第一次统计出现的个数，第二次寻找次数为1的字符 class Solution { public: int FirstNotRepeatingChar(string str) { unordered_map<char, int> m; for (int i = 0; i < str.size(); i++) m[str[i]] += 1; for (int i = 0; i < str.size(); i++) { if (m[str[i]] == 1) return i; } return -1; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：456k // 思路二：用数组代替 map class Solution { public: int FirstNotRepeatingChar(string str) { vector<int> m(100, 0); for (int i = 0; i < str.

item.title: 丑数
item.description: // 思路一：分三组累乘，取最小的，并更新下标 class Solution { public: int GetUglyNumber_Solution(int index) { if (index == 0) return 0; vector<int> nums{1}; int i1 = 0, i2 = 0, i3 = 0; while (--index) { int n1 = nums[i1] * 2; int n2 = nums[i2] * 3; int n3 = nums[i3] * 5; int min_ = min(n1, min(n2, n3)); if (min_ == n1) i1++; if (min_ == n2) i2++; if (min_ == n3) i3++; nums.

item.title: 两个链表的第一个公共结点
item.description: class Solution { public: ListNode* FindFirstCommonNode(ListNode* pHead1, ListNode* pHead2) { auto p = pHead1, q = pHead2; while (p || q) { if (p == q) return p; if (!p) p = pHead2, q = q->next; else if (!q) q = pHead1, p = p->next; else p = p->next, q = q->next; } return NULL; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：484k

item.title: 把数组排成最小的数
item.description: // 思路一：对数进行排序，拼接效果差的排在前面 class Solution { public: string PrintMinNumber(vector<int> numbers) { sort(numbers.begin(), numbers.end(), [](auto a, auto b){return to_string(a) + to_string(b) < to_string(b) + to_string(a);}); string result = ""; for (auto i : numbers) result += to_string(i); return result; } }; // 运行时间：4ms // 占用内存：380k

item.title: 整数中1出现的次数（从1到n整数中1出现的次数）
item.description: // 思路一：简单粗暴，一个一个数的统计 class Solution { public: int NumberOf1Between1AndN_Solution(int n) { int cnt = 0; for (int i = 0; i <= n; i++) { string tmp = to_string(i); for (int j = 0; j < tmp.length(); j++) cnt += tmp[j] == '1' ? 1 : 0; } return cnt; } }; // 运行时间：6ms // 占用内存：488k // 思路二：找规律，比较麻烦，挖个坑

item.title: 连续子数组的最大和
item.description: // 思路一：dp, 以第 i 项结尾的最大连续和 class Solution { public: int FindGreatestSumOfSubArray(vector<int> array) { int max_ = INT_MIN; vector<int> dp(array.begin(), array.end()); for (int i = 1; i < array.size(); i++) { dp[i] = max(dp[i-1], 0) + array[i]; max_ = max(max_, dp[i]); } return max_; } }; // 运行时间：4ms // 占用内存：488k // 思路二：状态转移只和前一项有关，可以原位进行 class Solution { public: int FindGreatestSumOfSubArray(vector<int> array) { int max_ = INT_MIN; for (int i = 1; i < array.

item.title: 最小的K个数
item.description: // 思路一：使用 priority_queue 保存，再存入 vector 返回 class Solution { public: vector<int> GetLeastNumbers_Solution(vector<int> input, int k) { vector<int> result; if (k > input.size()) return result; priority_queue<int> q; for (auto i : input) { q.push(i); if (q.size() > k) q.pop(); } while (!q.empty()) { result.push_back(q.top()); q.pop(); } return result; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：484k

item.title: 数组中出现次数超过一半的数字
item.description: // 思路一：使用 map 保存出现的次数，大于一半就返回 class Solution { public: int MoreThanHalfNum_Solution(vector<int> numbers) { int n = numbers.size() / 2 + 1; unordered_map<int, int> m; for (auto i : numbers) { m[i] += 1; if (m[i] >= n) return i; } return 0; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：484k

item.title: 字符串的排列
item.description: // 思路一：列出所有结果，考虑 DFS，出口是 size 一致，注意重复的剪枝 class Solution { public: vector<string> Permutation(string str) { vector<string> result; if (str.size() == 0) return result; vector<bool> used(str.size(), false); sort(str.begin(), str.end()); dfs(str, "", used, result); return result; } void dfs(string& str, string out, vector<bool>& used, vector<string>& result) { if (str.size() == out.size()) {result.push_back(out); return;} for (int i = 0; i < str.size(); i++) { if (i > 0 && str[i] == str[i-1] && !used[i-1]) continue; if (!

item.title: 二叉搜索树与双向链表
item.description: // 思路一：因为是排序的双向链表，所以考虑中序遍历加递归，在没有连接之间的节点建立连接即可 class Solution { public: TreeNode* Convert(TreeNode* pRootOfTree) { if (!pRootOfTree) return NULL; auto l = Convert(pRootOfTree->left); auto t = l; while (t && t->right) t = t->right; if (t) t->right = pRootOfTree; pRootOfTree->left = t; auto r = Convert(pRootOfTree->right); if (r) r->left = pRootOfTree; pRootOfTree->right = r; return l ? l : pRootOfTree; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：616k // 思路二：维护一个前驱指针，使用中序遍历 class Solution { public: TreeNode* Convert(TreeNode* pRootOfTree) { if (!

item.title: 复杂链表的复制
item.description: // 思路一：可以分三步完成，复制节点，复制指针，拆分节点，注意第三步必须要拆分，要保证原本的链表不变 class Solution { public: RandomListNode* Clone(RandomListNode* pHead) { auto p = pHead; if (!p) return NULL; while (p) { auto t = new RandomListNode(p->label); auto n = p->next; p->next = t; t->next = n; p = n; } p = pHead; while (p && p->next) { p->next->random = p->random ? p->random->next : NULL; p = p->next->next; } auto rtn = pHead->next; p = pHead; while (p->next) { auto tmp = p->next; p->next = tmp->next; p = tmp; } return rtn; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：488k

item.title: 二叉树中和为某一值的路径
item.description: // 思路一：dfs，出口是叶子节点且 target 为根结点的值 class Solution { public: vector<vector<int> > FindPath(TreeNode* root,int expectNumber) { vector<vector<int> > result; if (!root) return result; dfs(root, expectNumber, {}, result); sort(result.begin(), result.end(), [](auto a, auto b) { return a.size() > b.size();}); return result; } void dfs(TreeNode* root, int target, vector<int> out, vector<vector<int> >& result) { out.push_back(root->val); if (target == root->val && !root->left && !root->right) { result.push_back(out); return; } if (root->left) dfs(root->left, target-root->val, out, result); if (root->right) dfs(root->right, target-root->val, out, result); } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：480k

item.title: 二叉搜索树的后序遍历序列
item.description: // 思路一：后序遍历的条件是，末尾元素可以将数组分为两端，前一段都小于它，后一段都大于它 class Solution { public: bool VerifySquenceOfBST(vector<int> sequence) { if (sequence.empty()) return false; return helper(sequence, 0, sequence.size() - 1); } bool helper(vector<int>& seq, int l, int r) { if (r - l <= 1) return true; int pivot = seq[r]; int li = l, ri = r - 1; while(seq[li] < pivot) li++; while(seq[ri] > pivot) ri--; if (li - ri == 1) return helper(seq, l, ri) && helper(seq, li, r-1); return false; } }; // 运行时间：2ms // 占用内存：608k

item.title: 从上往下打印二叉树
item.description: // 思路一：层序遍历，用 queue 保存当前层，遍历当前层，加入下一层 class Solution { public: vector<int> PrintFromTopToBottom(TreeNode* root) { vector<int> result; if (!root) return result; queue<TreeNode*> q; q.push(root); while (!q.empty()) { int c = q.size(); while (c--) { auto t = q.front(); q.pop(); result.push_back(t->val); if (t->left) q.push(t->left); if (t->right) q.push(t->right); } } return result; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：604k // 思路二：因为结果不需要区分层一层，可以再优化一下，去掉内层循环，但复杂度一致 class Solution { public: vector<int> PrintFromTopToBottom(TreeNode* root) { vector<int> result; if (!root) return result; queue<TreeNode*> q; q.

item.title: 栈的压入、弹出序列
item.description: // 思路一：模拟栈的行为，如果压入元素与popV的前列元素相等，则证明 push 之后随即 pop, 然后判断剩下的元素是否后近先出 class Solution { public: bool IsPopOrder(vector<int> pushV,vector<int> popV) { stack<int> test; int l = 0; for (auto i : pushV) { if (i == popV[l]) l++; else test.push(i); } while (!test.empty()) { if (test.top() != popV[l++]) return false; test.pop(); } return true; } }; // 运行时间：4ms // 占用内存：480k // 思路二：也是模拟栈的行为，每次 push 的时候，都可以一直 pop，直到栈顶元素与 popV 的前列元素不相等或者栈为空为止 class Solution { public: bool IsPopOrder(vector<int> pushV,vector<int> popV) { stack<int> test; int l = 0; for (auto i : pushV) { test.

item.title: 包含min函数的栈
item.description: // 思路一：添加辅助栈，只压入不大于栈顶元素的项，pop 的时候 s1.top() 一定大于等于 s2.top(), 只有当相等的时候, s2 才执行pop() class Solution { public: void push(int value) { s1.push(value); if (s2.empty() || s2.top() >= value) s2.push(value); } void pop() { if (s2.top() == s1.top()) s2.pop(); s1.pop(); } int top() { return s1.top(); } int min() { return s2.top(); } private: stack<int> s1; stack<int> s2; }; // 运行时间：2ms // 占用内存：480k

item.title: 顺时针打印矩阵
item.description: // 思路一：确定四个角的位置，然后按照右，下，左，上的顺序，需要注意的是左和上的时候，需要判断是否有新的一行或一列，不然会输出相同的元素 class Solution { public: vector<int> printMatrix(vector<vector<int> > matrix) { vector<int> result; if (matrix.empty() || matrix[0].empty()) return result; int m = matrix.size(), n = matrix[0].size(); int l = 0, r = n - 1, t = 0, d = m - 1; while (l <= r && t <= d) { for (int i = l; i <= r; i++) result.push_back(matrix[t][i]); for (int i = t + 1; i <= d; i++) result.

item.title: 二叉树的镜像
item.description: // 思路一：还是考虑递归，交换左右子树即可 class Solution { public: void Mirror(TreeNode *pRoot) { if (!pRoot) return; auto tmp = pRoot->left; pRoot->left = pRoot->right; pRoot->right = tmp; Mirror(pRoot->left); Mirror(pRoot->right); return; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：480k

item.title: 树的子结构
item.description: // 思路一：树的问题大多要用递归，当根结点值相等时，需要判断是否是找的子结构 class Solution { public: bool IsSubtree(TreeNode* a, TreeNode* b) { if (!b) return true; if (!a) return false; return a->val == b->val && IsSubtree(a->left, b->left) && IsSubtree(a->right, b->right); } bool HasSubtree(TreeNode* pRoot1, TreeNode* pRoot2) { if (!pRoot2 || !pRoot1) return false; return (pRoot1->val == pRoot2->val && IsSubtree(pRoot1, pRoot2)) || HasSubtree(pRoot1->left, pRoot2) || HasSubtree(pRoot1->right, pRoot2); } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：376k

item.title: 合并两个排序的链表
item.description: // 思路一：递归，每次比两个节点的值 class Solution { public: ListNode* Merge(ListNode* pHead1, ListNode* pHead2) { if (!pHead1) return pHead2; if (!pHead2) return pHead1; ListNode* head = NULL; if (pHead1 -> val <= pHead2 -> val) { head = pHead1; head -> next = Merge(pHead1->next, pHead2); } else { head = pHead2; head -> next = Merge(pHead1, pHead2->next); } return head; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：460k

item.title: 反转链表
item.description: // 思路一：递归，首先找到递归的出口，也就是返回值，然后每次递归出口从后往前依次反 // 转一个节点 class Solution { public: ListNode* ReverseList(ListNode* pHead) { if (!pHead || !pHead -> next) return pHead; auto reverseHead = ReverseList(pHead -> next); pHead -> next -> next = pHead; pHead -> next = NULL; return reverseHead; } }; // 运行时间：4ms // 占用内存：480k // 思路二：非递归，每次反转一个，设立一个 pre 指针变量 class Solution { public: ListNode* ReverseList(ListNode* pHead) { if (!pHead || !pHead -> next) return pHead; ListNode* rtn = NULL, *pre = NULL; while (pHead) { auto tmp = pHead -> next; if (!

item.title: 链表中倒数第k个结点
item.description: // 思路一：用数组直接存起来，空间开销O(n)，时间开销O(n) class Solution { public: ListNode* FindKthToTail(ListNode* pListHead, unsigned int k) { vector<ListNode*> tmp; auto p = pListHead; while (p) {tmp.push_back(p); p = p -> next;} if (tmp.size() < k) return NULL; return tmp[tmp.size() - k]; } }; // 运行时间：4ms // 占用内存：532k // 思路二：双指针，指针一快指针二 k-1 步，当指针二为空时，指针一为倒数第K个 class Solution { public: ListNode* FindKthToTail(ListNode* pListHead, unsigned int k) { auto p = pListHead, q = pListHead; int cnt = 0, nowk = k; while (p) { cnt++; if (nowk-- < 1) q = q -> next; p = p -> next; } if (cnt < k) return NULL; return q; } }; // 运行时间：5ms // 占用内存：504k

item.title: 调整数组顺序使奇数位于偶数前面
item.description: // 思路一：空间换时间，O(n) class Solution { public: void reOrderArray(vector<int> &array) { vector<int> tmp; for (auto i : array) if (i & 1) tmp.push_back(i); for (auto i : array) if (!(i & 1)) tmp.push_back(i); array = tmp; } }; // 运行时间：4ms // 占用内存：504k // 思路二：冒泡排序，但是内循环必须从后往前 class Solution { public: void reOrderArray(vector<int> &array) { for (int i = 0; i < array.size(); i++) { for (int j = array.size() - 1; j > i; j--) { if (!

item.title: 数值的整数次方
item.description: // 思路一：直接使用内置函数 class Solution { public: double Power(double base, int exponent) { return pow(base, exponent); } }; // 运行时间：5ms // 占用内存：508k // 思路二：一个一个乘，需要判断正负 class Solution { public: double Power(double base, int exponent) { bool flag = exponent > 0 ? true : false; exponent = exponent > 0 ? exponent : -exponent; double rtn = 1.0; while (exponent--) rtn *= base; return flag ? rtn : 1 / rtn; } }; // 运行时间：5ms // 占用内存：476k // 思路三：使用二分递归，需要根据递归判断返回值 class Solution { public: double Power(double base, int exponent) { bool flag = exponent > 0 ?

item.title: 二进制中1的个数
item.description: // 思路一：n = n&(n-1) 总会把最右边的1变为0 class Solution { public: int NumberOf1(int n) { int cnt = 0; while (n) {cnt++; n = n&(n-1);} return cnt; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：472k // 思路二：一位一位的判断是否为1 class Solution { public: int NumberOf1(int n) { int cnt = 0; for (int i = 0; i < 32; i++) { cnt += (n >> i) & 1; } return cnt; } }; // 运行时间：5ms // 占用内存：512k

item.title: 矩形覆盖
item.description: // 思路一：和斐波那契一样，递归会超时 class Solution { public: int rectCover(int number) { if (number == 0) return 0; int a = 1, b = 2; while (--number) { int tmp = b; b = a + b; a = tmp; } return a; } }; // 运行时间：4ms // 占用内存：464k

item.title: 变态跳台阶
item.description: // 思路一：使用递推，每次可以跳1～i步，累加即可 class Solution { public: int jumpFloorII(int number) { vector<int> rtn({1, 1}); for (int i = 2; i <= number; i++) { int tmp = 0; for (int j = 1; j <= i; j++) tmp += rtn[i-j]; rtn.push_back(tmp); } return rtn.back(); } }; // 运行时间：4ms // 占用内存：460k // 思路二：数学可以推导出，f(n) = 2f(n-1)，使用左移来实现 class Solution { public: int jumpFloorII(int number) { return 1 << (number - 1); } }; // 运行时间：4ms // 占用内存：472k

item.title: 跳台阶
item.description: // 思路一： 使用递归非常简单，时间较长，因为有大量的重复计算 class Solution { public: int jumpFloor(int number) { if (number == 1 || number == 0) return 1; return jumpFloor(number - 1) + jumpFloor(number - 2); } }; // 运行时间：576ms // 占用内存：488k // 思路二： 使用循环，和斐波那契数列基本上一样 class Solution { public: int jumpFloor(int number) { int a = 1, b = 1; while (number--) { int tmp = a + b; a = b; b = tmp; } return a; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：460k

item.title: 斐波那契数列
item.description: // 思路一：递归如果不储存的话会超时，使用循环 class Solution { public: int Fibonacci(int n) { int a = 0, b = 1; while (n--) { int tmp = a + b; a = b; b = tmp; } return a; } }; // 运行时间：4ms // 占用内存：484k

item.title: 旋转数组的最小数字
item.description: // 思路一：二分查找，如果左值小于右值，必定是递增，返回左值；如果中间值大于左值 // 则必在右边，若在左边则左值大于右值大于中间值，同理，如果中间值小于右值，必在 // 左边，若在右边则中间值大于左值大于右值，else 的情况只能为 l++，不能为 r-- class Solution { public: int minNumberInRotateArray(vector<int> rotateArray) { if (rotateArray.empty()) return 0; int l = 0, r = rotateArray.size() - 1; while (l < r) { if (rotateArray[l] < rotateArray[r]) return rotateArray[l]; int mid = l + (r - l) / 2; if (rotateArray[mid] > rotateArray[l]) l = mid + 1; else if (rotateArray[mid] < rotateArray[r]) r = mid; else l++; } return rotateArray[l]; } }; // 运行时间：27ms // 占用内存：612k // 思路二：也是二分，判断条件变化了一些，更容易理解，只与右边的比较，如果大的话，肯定 // 在右边，因为有一个减少过程，如果小的话，肯定在左边，与上文相同，如果相等的话，无法 // 判断，让 r--。 class Solution { public: int minNumberInRotateArray(vector<int> rotateArray) { if (rotateArray.

item.title: 用两个栈实现队列
item.description: // 思路一：数据储存在栈一，pop 的时候倒入栈二，再倒回来 class Solution { public: void push(int node) { stack1.push(node); } int pop() { while (!stack1.empty()) {stack2.push(stack1.top()); stack1.pop();} int rtn = stack2.top(); stack2.pop(); while (!stack2.empty()) {stack1.push(stack2.top()); stack2.pop();} return rtn; } private: stack<int> stack1; stack<int> stack2; }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：456k // 思路二：小优化，只有当栈二空了才压入栈一的元素，因为先压入的总会先出。 class Solution { public: void push(int node) { stack1.push(node); } int pop() { if (stack2.empty()) { while (!stack1.empty()) { stack2.push(stack1.top()); stack1.pop(); } } int rtn = stack2.

item.title: 重建二叉树
item.description: // 思路一：使用递归重建，每次重建一个节点，将两组数在根结点处划分成两段递归调用 // 注意细节处理，第一次调用右节点为 pre.size()-1，调用体的 for loop 使用 // i <= rv - lv，以及出口为 lv > rv class Solution { public: TreeNode* reConstructBinaryTree(vector<int> pre,vector<int> vin) { return helper(pre, vin, 0, pre.size()-1, 0, vin.size()-1); } TreeNode* helper(vector<int>& pre, vector<int>& vin, int lp, int rp, int lv, int rv) { if (lp > rp || lv > rv) return NULL; TreeNode* rtn = new TreeNode(pre[lp]); if (lp == rp && lv == rv) return rtn; for (int i = 0; i <= rv - lv; i++) { if (vin[i+lv] == pre[lp]) { rtn -> left = helper(pre, vin, lp+1, lp+i, lv, lv+i-1); rtn -> right = helper(pre, vin, lp+i+1, rp, lv+i+1, rv); break; } } return rtn; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：480k

item.title: 从尾到头打印链表
item.description: // 思路一：从头到尾储存，然后使用 reverse 反向 class Solution { public: vector<int> printListFromTailToHead(ListNode* head) { vector<int> result; while (head) {result.push_back(head->val); head = head -> next;} reverse(result.begin(), result.end()); return result; } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：608k // 思路二：递归调用，出口设置在链表尾，和使用栈是一个效果 class Solution { public: vector<int> printListFromTailToHead(ListNode* head) { vector<int> result; helper(head, result); return result; } void helper(ListNode* head, vector<int>& result) { if (!head) return; helper(head->next, result); result.push_back(head->val); } }; // 运行时间：2ms // 占用内存：460k

item.title: 替换空格
item.description: // 思路一：c++ 处理这种比较麻烦，python 或者 java 应该很简单，思路是先计算替换后 // 的长度然后从后往前替换 class Solution { public: void replaceSpace(char *str,int length) { int newL = strlen(str), oldL = strlen(str); for (int i = 0; i < oldL; i++) if (str[i] == ' ') newL += 2; if (newL >= length) return; int idx = newL; for (int i = oldL; i >= 0; i--) { if (str[i] == ' ') { str[idx--] = '0'; str[idx--] = '2'; str[idx--] = '%'; } else str[idx--] = str[i]; } } }; // 运行时间：3ms // 占用内存：476k

item.title: 二维数组中的查找
item.description: // 思路一：从左上角开始搜索，不停地减少列的搜索数 class Solution { public: bool Find(int target, vector<vector<int> > array) { if (array.empty() || array[0].empty()) return false; int m = array.size(), n = array[0].size(); int t = n; for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < t; j++) { if (array[i][j] == target) return true; if (array[i][j] > target) {t = j; break;} } } return false; } }; // 运行时间：12ms // 占用内存：1400k // 思路二：从左下角开始搜索，如果小就往右，大就往上 class Solution { public: bool Find(int target, vector<vector<int> > array) { if (array.

item.title: 114.Flatten Binary Tree to Linked List
item.description: /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: void flatten(TreeNode* root) { if (!root) return; if (root->left) flatten(root->left); if (root->right) flatten(root->right); auto tmp = root -> right; root -> right = root -> left; root -> left = NULL; while (root->right) root = root -> right; root -> right = tmp; } };

item.title: 111.Minimum Depth of Binary Tree
item.description: /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: int minDepth(TreeNode* root) { if (!root) return 0; if (!root->left) return 1 + minDepth(root -> right); if (!root->right) return 1 + minDepth(root -> left); return 1 + min(minDepth(root->right), minDepth(root->left)); } };

item.title: 110.Balanced Binary Tree
item.description: /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: bool isBalanced(TreeNode* root) { if (!root) return true; if (abs(getDepth(root->left) - getDepth(root->right)) > 1) return false; return isBalanced(root->left) && isBalanced(root->right); } int getDepth(TreeNode* root) { if (!root) return 0; return max(getDepth(root->left), getDepth(root->right)) + 1; } };

item.title: 109.Convert Sorted List to Binary Search Tree
item.description: /** * Definition for singly-linked list. * struct ListNode { * int val; * ListNode *next; * ListNode(int x) : val(x), next(NULL) {} * }; */ /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: TreeNode* sortedListToBST(ListNode* head) { return helper(head, NULL); } TreeNode* helper(ListNode* begin, ListNode* end) { if (begin == end) return NULL; auto fast = begin, slow = begin; while (fast !

item.title: 105.Construct Binary Tree from Preorder and Inorder Traversal
item.description: /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: TreeNode* buildTree(vector<int>& preorder, vector<int>& inorder) { int n = preorder.size() - 1; return helper(preorder, inorder, 0, n, 0, n); } TreeNode* helper(vector<int>& preorder, vector<int>& inorder, int lp, int rp, int li, int ri) { if (lp > rp || li > ri) return nullptr; if (lp == rp && li == ri) { auto tmp = new TreeNode(inorder[li]); return tmp; } for (int i = li; i <= ri; i++) { if (inorder[i] == preorder[lp]) { auto tmp = new TreeNode(inorder[i]); auto off = i - li; tmp -> left = helper(preorder, inorder, lp + 1, lp + off, li, i - 1); tmp -> right = helper(preorder, inorder, lp + off + 1, rp, i + 1, ri); return tmp; } } return nullptr; } };

item.title: 300.Longest Increasing Subsequence
item.description: class Solution { public: int lengthOfLIS(vector<int>& nums) { if (nums.size() == 0) return 0; int n = nums.size(), max_ = 1; vector<int> dp(n, 1); for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < i; j++) { if (nums[j] < nums[i]) dp[i] = max(dp[i], dp[j] + 1); } max_ = max(max_, dp[i]); } return max_; } };

item.title: 279.Perfect Squares
item.description: class Solution { public: int numSquares(int n) { vector<int> dp(n+1, n); vector<int> p; dp[0] = 0; for (int i = 1; i <= sqrt(n) + 0.1; i++) p.push_back(i*i); for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < p.size(); j++) { if (p[j] <= i) dp[i] = min(dp[i], 1 + dp[i - p[j]]); else break; } } return dp[n]; } };

item.title: 264.Ugly Number II
item.description: class Solution { public: int nthUglyNumber(int n) { vector<int> res({1}); int i2 = 0, i3 = 0, i5 = 0; for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) { int m2 = res[i2] * 2, m3 = res[i3] * 3, m5 = res[i5] * 5; int mm = min(m2, min(m3, m5)); if (mm == m2) i2++; if (mm == m3) i3++; if (mm == m5) i5++; res.push_back(mm); } return res.

item.title: 263.Ugly Number
item.description: class Solution { public: bool isUgly(int num) { if (num < 1) return false; while (num % 2 == 0) num /= 2; while (num % 3 == 0) num /= 3; while (num % 5 == 0) num /= 5; return num == 1; } };

item.title: 257.Binary Tree Paths
item.description: /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: vector<string> binaryTreePaths(TreeNode* root) { vector<string> res; DFS("", res, root); return res; } void DFS(string out, vector<string>& res, TreeNode* root) { if (!root) return; if (!root->left && !root->right) {out += to_string(root->val); res.push_back(out); return;} if (root->left) DFS(out+to_string(root->val)+"->", res, root->left); if (root->right) DFS(out+to_string(root->val)+"->", res, root->right); } };

item.title: 113.Path Sum II
item.description: /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: vector<vector<int>> pathSum(TreeNode* root, int sum) { vector<vector<int>> res; DFS(root, {}, res, sum); return res; } void DFS(TreeNode* root, vector<int> out, vector<vector<int>>& res, int sum) { if (!root) return; out.push_back(root->val); if (!root->left && !root->right && root->val == sum) { res.

item.title: 112.Path Sum
item.description: /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: bool hasPathSum(TreeNode* root, int sum) { if (!root) return false; if (!root->left && !root->right && sum == root -> val) return true; return hasPathSum(root->left, sum-root->val) || hasPathSum(root->right, sum-root->val); } };

item.title: 95.Unique Binary Search Trees II
item.description: /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: vector<TreeNode*> generateTrees(int n) { if (n == 0) return {}; return helper(1, n); } vector<TreeNode*> helper(int left, int right) { if (left > right) return {nullptr}; vector<TreeNode*> res; for (int i = left; i <= right; i++) { auto ll = helper(left, i-1); auto rr = helper(i+1, right); for (auto l : ll) { for (auto r : rr) { auto t = new TreeNode(i); t -> left = l; t -> right = r; res.

item.title: 93.Restore IP Addresses
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<string> restoreIpAddresses(string s) { vector<string> result; if (s.size() > 12) return result; DFS(0, 0, "", result, s); return result; } void DFS(int num, int cur, string out, vector<string>& result, string s) { if (num == 4 && cur == s.size()) {out.pop_back(); result.push_back(out); return;} for (int i = 1; i <= 3 && cur + i <= s.size(); i++) { auto tmp = s.substr(cur, i); if (stoi(tmp) < 256 && !

item.title: 322.Coin Change
item.description: class Solution { public: int coinChange(vector<int>& coins, int amount) { vector<int> dp(amount + 1, amount+1); sort(coins.begin(), coins.end()); dp[0] = 0; for (int i = 1; i <= amount; i++) { for (auto c : coins) { if (c <= i) dp[i] = min(dp[i], dp[i-c]+1); else break; } } return dp[amount] > amount ? -1 : dp[amount]; } };

item.title: 334.Increasing Triplet Subsequence
item.description: class Solution { public: bool increasingTriplet(vector<int>& nums) { int m1 = INT_MAX, m2 = INT_MAX; for (auto i : nums) { if (m1 >= i) m1 = i; else if (m2 >= i) m2 = i; else return true; } return false; } };

item.title: 332.Reconstruct Itinerary
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<string> findItinerary(vector<vector<string>>& tickets) { unordered_map<string, multiset<string>> m; for (auto j : tickets) m[j[0]].insert(j[1]); vector<string> result; DFS(m, "JFK", result); return vector<string>(result.rbegin(), result.rend()); } void DFS(unordered_map<string, multiset<string>>& m, string s, vector<string>& result){ while (m[s].size() > 0) { string tmp = *m[s].begin(); m[s].erase(m[s].begin()); DFS(m, tmp, result); } result.push_back(s); } };

item.title: 338.Counting Bits
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<int> countBits(int num) { vector<int> res(num+1, 0); for (int i = 1; i <= num; i++) { res[i] = res[i & (i-1)] + 1; } return res; } };

item.title: 345.Reverse Vowels of a String
item.description: class Solution { public: string reverseVowels(string s) { int i = 0, j = s.size() - 1; while (i < j) { while (i < j && s[i] != 'a' && s[i] != 'e' && s[i] != 'i' && s[i] != 'o' && s[i] != 'u' && s[i] != 'A' && s[i] != 'E' && s[i] != 'I' && s[i] != 'O' && s[i] != 'U') i++; while (i < j && s[j] !

item.title: 341.Flatten Nested List Iterator
item.description: /** * // This is the interface that allows for creating nested lists. * // You should not implement it, or speculate about its implementation * class NestedInteger { * public: * // Return true if this NestedInteger holds a single integer, rather than a nested list. * bool isInteger() const; * * // Return the single integer that this NestedInteger holds, if it holds a single integer * // The result is undefined if this NestedInteger holds a nested list * int getInteger() const; * * // Return the nested list that this NestedInteger holds, if it holds a nested list * // The result is undefined if this NestedInteger holds a single integer * const vector<NestedInteger> &getList() const; * }; */ class NestedIterator { public: void helper(vector<NestedInteger> &n, vector<int>& v) { for (auto i : n) { if (i.

item.title: 342.Power of Four
item.description: class Solution { public: bool isPowerOfFour(int num) { return (num > 0) && !(num & (num - 1)) && (num & 0x55555555) == num; } };

item.title: 231.Power of Two
item.description: class Solution { public: bool isPowerOfTwo(int n) { return (n > 0) && !(n & (n - 1)); } };

item.title: 343.Integer Break
item.description: class Solution { public: int integerBreak(int n) { vector<int> dp(n+1, 1); for (int i = 3; i <= n; i++) { for (int j = 1; j < i; j++) { dp[i] = max(dp[i], max(j * (i - j), j * dp[i - j])); } } return dp[n]; } };

item.title: 58. Length of Last Word
item.description: class Solution { public: int lengthOfLastWord(string s) { int res = 0, n = s.size(); int i = n - 1; while (i >= 0 && s[i] == ' ') i--; while (i >= 0 && s[i] != ' ') { res++; i--; } return res; } };

item.title: 122. Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock II
item.description: class Solution { public: int maxProfit(vector<int>& prices) { int res = 0, n = prices.size(); for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) { if (prices[i] < prices[i+1]) res += prices[i+1] - prices[i]; } return res; } };

item.title: 307. Range Sum Query - Mutable
item.description: class NumArray { public: NumArray(vector<int>& nums) { sum.push_back(0); for (auto n : nums) { sum.push_back(sum.back()+n); num.push_back(n); } } void update(int i, int val) { auto t = val - num[i]; num[i] = val; for (int j = i + 1; j < sum.size(); j++) sum[j] += t; } int sumRange(int i, int j) { return sum[j+1] - sum[i]; } private: vector<int> sum; vector<int> num; }; /** * Your NumArray object will be instantiated and called as such: * NumArray* obj = new NumArray(nums); * obj->update(i,val); * int param_2 = obj->sumRange(i,j); */

item.title: 383. Ransom Note
item.description: class Solution { public: bool canConstruct(string ransomNote, string magazine) { unordered_map<char, int> m; for (auto c : magazine) m[c] += 1; for (auto c : ransomNote) { if (!m.count(c) || m[c] == 0) return false; m[c] -= 1; } return true; } };

item.title: 389. Find the Difference
item.description: class Solution { public: char findTheDifference(string s, string t) { unordered_map<char, int> m; for (auto c : s) m[c] += 1; for (auto c : t) { if (!m.count(c) || m[c] == 0) return c; m[c] -= 1; } return 'A'; } };

item.title: 392. Is Subsequence
item.description: class Solution { public: bool isSubsequence(string s, string t) { unordered_map<char, vector<int>> m; for (int i = 0; i < t.size(); i++) m[t[i]].push_back(i); int left = -1; for (auto c : s) { if (!m.count(c)) return false; auto flag = false; for (auto l : m[c]) { if (l > left) { left = l; flag = true; break; } } if (!flag) return false; } return true; } };

item.title: 63. Unique Paths II
item.description: class Solution { public: int uniquePathsWithObstacles(vector<vector<int>>& obstacleGrid) { int m = obstacleGrid.size(), n = obstacleGrid[0].size(); vector<vector<unsigned int>> dp(m, vector<unsigned int>(n, 0)); if (obstacleGrid[0][0]) return 0; dp[0][0] = 1; for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { if (obstacleGrid[i][j]) continue; if (i > 0 && !obstacleGrid[i-1][j]) dp[i][j] += dp[i-1][j]; if (j > 0 && !obstacleGrid[i][j-1]) dp[i][j] += dp[i][j-1]; } } return dp[m-1][n-1]; } };

item.title: 62. Unique Paths
item.description: class Solution { public: int uniquePaths(int m, int n) { vector<vector<int>> dp(m, vector<int>(n, 0)); dp[0][0] = 1; for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { dp[i][j] += i > 0 ? dp[i-1][j] : 0; dp[i][j] += j > 0 ? dp[i][j-1] : 0; } } return dp[m-1][n-1]; } };

item.title: 174. Dungeon Game
item.description: class Solution { public: int calculateMinimumHP(vector<vector<int>>& dungeon) { int m = dungeon.size(), n = dungeon[0].size(); vector<vector<int>> dp(m+1, vector<int>(n+1, INT_MAX)); dp[m][n-1] = 1; dp[m-1][n] = 1; for (int i = m - 1; i >= 0; i--) { for (int j = n - 1; j >= 0; j--) { dp[i][j] = max(1, min(dp[i+1][j], dp[i][j+1]) - dungeon[i][j]); } } return dp[0][0]; } };

item.title: 64. Minimum Path Sum
item.description: class Solution { public: int minPathSum(vector<vector<int>>& grid) { int rtn = -1; vector<vector<int>> cost(grid.size(), vector<int>(grid[0].size(), 0)); cost[0][0] = grid[0][0]; for (int i = 0; i < grid.size(); i++) { for (int j = 0; j < grid[0].size(); j++) { if (i - 1 >= 0 && j - 1 >= 0) cost[i][j] = min(cost[i-1][j], cost[i][j-1]) + grid[i][j]; else if (i - 1 >= 0) cost[i][j] = cost[i-1][j] + grid[i][j]; else if (j - 1 >= 0) cost[i][j] = cost[i][j-1] + grid[i][j]; else cost[i][j] = grid[i][j]; } } return cost.

item.title: 179. Largest Number

"0" : result; } };

item.title: 152. Maximum Product Subarray
item.description: class Solution { public: int maxProduct(vector<int>& nums) { vector<int> dp(nums.size() * 2, 0); dp[0] = nums[0]; dp[1] = nums[0]; int max_ = dp[0]; for (int i = 1; i < nums.size(); i++) { dp[2*i] = max(max(nums[i]*dp[2*i-1], nums[i]*dp[2*i-2]), nums[i]); dp[2*i+1] = min(min(nums[i]*dp[2*i-1], nums[i]*dp[2*i-2]), nums[i]); max_ = max(max_, dp[2*i]); } return max_; } };

item.title: DFS 生成所有结果
item.description: 生成所有结果的题，第一时间要想到使用 DFS 和递归来解决。 主要分为以下几步， 确定 DFS 的跳出条件，对应树结构的子节点。 确定剪枝条件，这个是最麻烦的，需要对题目进行分析 确定继续搜索的方向 Leetcode 上的例题有，22，39，40 22. Generate Parentheses 这一题是给出一个数 n，生成所有的括号组合。 因为是所有的括号组合，想到用 DFS 和递归来解决。 首先确定 DFS 的跳出条件，我们可以设置两个变量 left，right 分别维护左右括号的剩余数量， 当两者都为0的时候跳出。 接着确定剪枝条件，其实跳出条件也可以用整个字符串的长度来维护，但是体现不出括号的特殊性，所以设置两个变量 left，right，因为字符串是从左往右增长的，当 right < left 的时候，意味着有右括号先于左括号出来，需要进行剪枝。 最后确定继续搜索的方向，其实就两种选择，要么加左括号，要么加右括号，注意要回溯，如果 out 的值被更改的话。 class Solution { public: vector<string> generateParenthesis(int n) { int left = n, right = n; vector<string> result; string out = ""; DFS(left, right, out, result); return result; } void DFS(int left, int right, string& out, vector<string>& result) { if (left == 0 && right == 0) {result.

item.title: 90. Subsets II
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<vector<int>> subsetsWithDup(vector<int>& nums) { vector<vector<int>> result; vector<int> out; sort(nums.begin(), nums.end()); DFS(0, out, nums, result); return result; } void DFS(int cur, vector<int> out, vector<int>& nums, vector<vector<int>>& result) { result.push_back(out); for (int i = cur; i < nums.size(); i++) { out.push_back(nums[i]); DFS(i+1, out, nums, result); out.pop_back(); while (i + 1 < nums.size() && nums[i] == nums[i + 1]) i++; } } };

item.title: 88. Merge Sorted Array
item.description: class Solution { public: void merge(vector<int>& nums1, int m, vector<int>& nums2, int n) { int cur = m + n - 1, i = m - 1, j = n - 1; while (i >= 0 && j >= 0) { if (nums1[i] >= nums2[j]) nums1[cur--] = nums1[i--]; else nums1[cur--] = nums2[j--]; } while (j >= 0) nums1[cur--] = nums2[j--]; } };

item.title: 83. Remove Duplicates from Sorted List
item.description: /** * Definition for singly-linked list. * struct ListNode { * int val; * ListNode *next; * ListNode(int x) : val(x), next(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: ListNode* deleteDuplicates(ListNode* head) { if (!head || !head -> next) return head; while (head -> next && head -> val == head -> next -> val) head = head -> next; head -> next = deleteDuplicates(head -> next); return head; } };

item.title: 79. Word Search

item.title: 78. Subsets
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<vector<int>> subsets(vector<int>& nums) { vector<vector<int>> result; vector<int> out; DFS(0, out, result, nums); return result; } void DFS(int cur, vector<int> out, vector<vector<int>>& result, vector<int>& nums) { result.push_back(out); for (int i = cur; i < nums.size(); i++) { out.push_back(nums[i]); DFS(i+1, out, result, nums); out.pop_back(); } } };

item.title: 77. Combinations
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<vector<int>> combine(int n, int k) { vector<vector<int>> result; vector<int> out; DFS(1, out, result, n, k); return result; } void DFS(int cur, vector<int> out, vector<vector<int>>& result, int n, int k) { if (out.size() == k) {result.push_back(out); return;} for (int i = cur; i <= n; i++) { out.push_back(i); DFS(i+1, out, result, n, k); out.pop_back(); } } };

item.title: 49. Group Anagrams
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<vector<string>> groupAnagrams(vector<string>& strs) { vector<vector<string>> result; unordered_map<string, vector<string>> m; for (auto s : strs) { auto t = s; sort(t.begin(), t.end()); if (m.count(t)) m[t].push_back(s); else m[t] = {s}; } for (auto i : m) result.push_back(i.second); return result; } };

item.title: 40. Combination Sum II
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<vector<int>> combinationSum2(vector<int>& candidates, int target) { vector<int> out; vector<vector<int>> result; sort(candidates.begin(), candidates.end()); DFS(candidates, out, result, 0, target); return result; } void DFS(vector<int>& candidates, vector<int>& out, vector<vector<int>>& result, int start, int target) { if (target < 0) return; if (target == 0) {result.push_back(out); return;} for (int i = start; i < candidates.size(); i++) { if (i > start && candidates[i] == candidates[i-1]) continue; out.push_back(candidates[i]); DFS(candidates, out, result, i+1, target - candidates[i]); out.

item.title: 39. Combination Sum
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<vector<int>> combinationSum(vector<int>& candidates, int target) { vector<int> out; vector<vector<int>> result; DFS(candidates, out, result, 0, target); return result; } void DFS(vector<int>& candidates, vector<int>& out, vector<vector<int>>& result, int start, int target) { if (target < 0) return; if (target == 0) {result.push_back(out); return;} for (int i = start; i < candidates.size(); i++) { out.push_back(candidates[i]); DFS(candidates, out, result, i, target - candidates[i]); out.pop_back(); } } };

item.title: 24. Swap Nodes in Pairs
item.description: /** * Definition for singly-linked list. * struct ListNode { * int val; * ListNode *next; * ListNode(int x) : val(x), next(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: ListNode* swapPairs(ListNode* head) { if (!head || !head -> next) return head; auto nxt = head -> next -> next; auto h = head; head = head -> next; head -> next = h; h -> next = swapPairs(nxt); return head; } };

item.title: 856. Score of Parentheses
item.description: class Solution { public: int scoreOfParentheses(string S) { int score = 0, n = S.size(); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { if (S[i] == '(') { int cnt = 1, j = i; while (cnt) { if (S[++j] == '(') cnt += 1; else cnt -= 1; } if (j == i + 1) score += 1; else score += 2 * scoreOfParentheses(S.substr(i + 1, j - i - 1)); i = j; } } return score; } };

item.title: 22. Generate Parentheses
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<string> generateParenthesis(int n) { int left = n, right = n; vector<string> result; DFS(left, right, "", result); return result; } void DFS(int left, int right, string out, vector<string>& result) { if (left > right) return; if (left == 0 && right == 0) result.push_back(out); else { if (left > 0) DFS(left - 1, right, out + "(", result); if (right > 0) DFS(left, right - 1, out + ")", result); } } };

item.title: 347. Top K Frequent Elements
item.description: class Solution { public: using ii = pair<int, int>; vector<int> topKFrequent(vector<int>& nums, int k) { auto cmp = [](auto i, auto j) {return i.second > j.second;}; unordered_map<int, int> m; priority_queue<ii, vector<ii>, decltype(cmp)> q(cmp); for (auto num : nums) m[num] += 1; for (auto i : m) { q.push(i); if (q.size() > k) q.pop(); } vector<int> res; while (!q.empty()) { res.push_back(q.top().first); q.pop(); } reverse(res.begin(), res.end()); return res; } };

item.title: 692. Top K Frequent Words

item.title: 55. Jump Game
item.description: class Solution { public: bool canJump(vector<int>& nums) { int n = nums.size(), reach = 0; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { if (i > reach || reach >= n - 1) break; reach = max(nums[i] + i, reach); } return reach >= n - 1; } };

item.title: 414. Third Maximum Number
item.description: class Solution { public: int thirdMax(vector<int>& nums) { long first = LONG_MIN, second = LONG_MIN, third = LONG_MIN; for (auto num : nums) { if (num > first) { third = second; second = first; first = num; } else if (num < first && num > second) { third = second; second = num; } else if (num < second && num > third) { third = num; } } return (third == LONG_MIN || third == second) ?

item.title: 21. Merge Two Sorted Lists
item.description: /** * Definition for singly-linked list. * struct ListNode { * int val; * ListNode *next; * ListNode(int x) : val(x), next(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: ListNode* mergeTwoLists(ListNode* l1, ListNode* l2) { if (!l1) return l2; if (!l2) return l1; if (l1 -> val < l2 -> val) { l1 -> next = mergeTwoLists(l1 -> next, l2); return l1; } else { l2 -> next = mergeTwoLists(l1, l2 -> next); return l2; } } };

item.title: 19. Remove Nth Node From End of List
item.description: /** * Definition for singly-linked list. * struct ListNode { * int val; * ListNode *next; * ListNode(int x) : val(x), next(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: ListNode* removeNthFromEnd(ListNode* head, int n) { auto cur = head, pre = head; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) cur = cur -> next; if (!cur) return head -> next; while (cur -> next) { cur = cur -> next; pre = pre -> next; } pre -> next = pre -> next -> next; return head; } };

item.title: 16. 3Sum Closest
item.description: class Solution { public: int threeSumClosest(vector<int>& nums, int target) { int res = nums[0] + nums[1] + nums[2]; int close = abs(res - target); sort(nums.begin(), nums.end()); for (int k = 0; k < (int)nums.size() - 2; k++) { int i = k + 1, j = (int)nums.size() - 1; while (i < j) { int tmp = nums[k] + nums[i] + nums[j]; if (tmp == target) return tmp; if (abs(tmp - target) < close) { res = tmp; close = abs(res - target); } if (tmp < target) i++; else if (tmp > target) j--; } } return res; } };

item.title: 1. Two Sum

item.title: 11. Container With Most Water

item.title: 9. Palindrome Number
item.description: class Solution { public: bool isPalindrome(int x) { if (x < 0 || (x % 10 == 0 && x != 0)) return false; return x == reverse(x); } int reverse(int x) { int res = 0; while (x != 0) { if (res > INT_MAX / 10) return -1; res = res * 10 + x % 10; x = x / 10; } return res; } };

item.title: 7. Reverse Integer
item.description: class Solution { public: int reverse(int x) { int res = 0; while (x != 0) { if (abs(res) > INT_MAX / 10) return 0; res = res * 10 + x % 10; x = x / 10; } return res; } };

item.title: 5. Longest Palindromic Substring

item.title: 3. Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
item.description: class Solution { public: int lengthOfLongestSubstring(string s) { int left = -1, res = 0, n = s.size(); unordered_map<int, int> visited; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { if (visited.count(s[i]) && visited[s[i]] > left) { left = visited[s[i]]; } visited[s[i]] = i; res = max(res, i - left); } return res; } };

item.title: 41. First Missing Positive
item.description: class Solution { public: int firstMissingPositive(vector<int>& nums) { for (int i = 0; i < nums.size(); i++) while (nums[i] > 0 && nums[i] <= nums.size() && nums[nums[i] - 1] != nums[i]) swap(nums[nums[i]-1], nums[i]); for (int i = 0; i < nums.size(); i++) if (nums[i] != i + 1) return i + 1; return nums.size() + 1; } };

item.title: 52. N-Queens II
item.description: class Solution { public: int totalNQueens(int n) { int cnt = 0; vector<string> out(n, string(n, '.')); helper(cnt, out, 0); return cnt; } void helper(int& cnt, vector<string>& out, int row) { if (row == out.size()) {cnt += 1; return;} for (int i = 0; i < out.size(); i++) { if (isValid(out, row, i)) { out[row][i] = 'Q'; helper(cnt, out, row+1); out[row][i] = '.'; } } } bool isValid(const vector<string>& out, int row, int col) { for (int i = row - 1; i >= 0; i--) { if (out[i][col] == 'Q') return false; if (col-row+i >= 0 && out[i][col-row+i] == 'Q') return false; if (col+row-i < out.

item.title: 51. N-Queens
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<vector<string>> solveNQueens(int n) { vector<vector<string>> res; vector<string> out(n, string(n, '.')); helper(res, out, 0); return res; } void helper(vector<vector<string>>& res, vector<string>& out, int row) { if (row == out.size()) {res.push_back(out); return;} for (int i = 0; i < out.size(); i++) { if (isValid(out, row, i)) { out[row][i] = 'Q'; helper(res, out, row+1); out[row][i] = '.'; } } } bool isValid(const vector<string>& out, int row, int col) { for (int i = row - 1; i >= 0; i--) { if (out[i][col] == 'Q') return false; if (col-row+i >= 0 && out[i][col-row+i] == 'Q') return false; if (col+row-i < out.

item.title: 47. Permutations II
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<vector<int>> permuteUnique(vector<int>& nums) { vector<vector<int>> res; vector<int> out, visited(nums.size(), 0); sort(nums.begin(), nums.end()); dfs(nums, out, visited, 0, res); return res; } void dfs(vector<int>& nums, vector<int>& out, vector<int>& visited, int level, vector<vector<int>>& res) { if (level == nums.size()) {res.push_back(out); return;} for (int i = 0; i < nums.size(); i++) { if (visited[i] == 1) continue; if (i > 0 && nums[i] == nums[i-1] && visited[i-1] == 0) continue; visited[i] = 1; out.

item.title: 46. Permutations
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<vector<int>> permute(vector<int>& nums) { vector<vector<int>> res; vector<int> out, visited(nums.size(), 0); dfs(nums, out, visited, 0, res); return res; } void dfs(vector<int>& nums, vector<int>& out, vector<int>& visited, int level, vector<vector<int>>& res){ if (level == nums.size()) {res.push_back(out); return;} for (int i = 0; i < nums.size(); i++) { if (visited[i] == 0) { visited[i] = 1; out.push_back(nums[i]); dfs(nums, out, visited, level + 1, res); out.pop_back(); visited[i] = 0; } } } };

item.title: 84. Largest Rectangle in Histogram
item.description: class Solution { public: int largestRectangleArea(vector<int>& heights) { int max_ = 0; for (int i = 0; i < heights.size(); i++) { if (i + 1 < heights.size() && heights[i] <= heights[i + 1]) continue; for (int j = i, h = heights[i]; j >= 0; j--) { h = min(h, heights[j]); auto area = h * (i - j + 1); max_ = max(max_, area); } } return max_; } };

item.title: 224. Basic Calculator
item.description: class Solution { public: int calculate(string s) { int rtn = 0; queue<char> op; queue<int> num; for (int i = 0; i < s.size();) { if (s[i] == '(') { int cnt = 1, start = i; while (cnt != 0) { i += 1; if (s[i] == '(') cnt += 1; else if (s[i] == ')') cnt -= 1; } num.push(calculate(s.substr(start + 1, i - start))); } else if (isdigit(s[i])) { int tmp = s[i] - '0'; while (isdigit(s[++i])) { tmp *= 10; tmp += s[i] - '0'; } num.

item.title: 394. Decode String
item.description: class Solution { public: string decodeString(string s) { string rtn = ""; for (int i = 0; i < s.size();) { if (isdigit(s[i])) { auto start = i; auto end = i; while (isdigit(s[++end])); auto n = stoi(s.substr(start, end-start+1)); start = end + 1; auto cnt = 1; while (cnt != 0) { end += 1; if (s[end] == '[') ++cnt; else if (s[end] == ']') --cnt; } auto con = decodeString(s.

item.title: 150. Evaluate Reverse Polish Notation
item.description: class Solution { public: int evalRPN(vector<string>& tokens) { stack<int> t; for (auto s : tokens) { if (isdigit(s[s.size()-1])) { t.push(stoi(s)); } else { auto num1 = t.top(); t.pop(); auto num2 = t.top(); t.pop(); if (s == "+") t.push(num2 + num1); else if (s == "*") t.push(num2 * num1); else if (s == "-") t.push(num2 - num1); else if (s == "/") t.push(num2 / num1); } } return t.top(); } };

item.title: 225. Implement Stack using Queues
item.description: class MyStack { public: /** Initialize your data structure here. */ MyStack() { } /** Push element x onto stack. */ void push(int x) { q.push(x); for (int i = 0; i < (int)q.size() - 1; i++) q.push(q.front()), q.pop(); } /** Removes the element on top of the stack and returns that element. */ int pop() { auto rtn = q.front(); q.pop(); return rtn; } /** Get the top element. */ int top() { auto rtn = q.

item.title: 232. Implement Queue using Stacks
item.description: class MyQueue { public: /** Initialize your data structure here. */ MyQueue() { } /** Push element x to the back of queue. */ void push(int x) { s1.push(x); } /** Removes the element from in front of queue and returns that element. */ int pop() { if (s2.empty()) { while (!s1.empty()) s2.push(s1.top()), s1.pop(); } auto rtn = s2.top(); s2.pop(); return rtn; } /** Get the front element. */ int peek() { if (s2.

item.title: 315. Count of Smaller Numbers After Self
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<int> countSmaller(vector<int>& nums) { vector<int> t, res(nums.size()); for (int i = nums.size() - 1; i >= 0; i--) { int left = 0, right = t.size(); while (left < right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (t[mid] < nums[i]) left = mid + 1; else right = mid; } res[i] = right; t.insert(t.begin() + right, nums[i]); } return res; } };

item.title: 349. Intersection of Two Arrays
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<int> intersection(vector<int>& nums1, vector<int>& nums2) { unordered_set<int> n1(nums1.begin(), nums1.end()), res; for (auto n : nums2) if (n1.count(n)) res.insert(n); return vector<int>(res.begin(), res.end()); } };

item.title: 374. Guess Number Higher or Lower
item.description: // Forward declaration of guess API. // @param num, your guess // @return -1 if my number is lower, 1 if my number is higher, otherwise return 0 int guess(int num); class Solution { public: int guessNumber(int n) { int left = 1, right = n; while (left <= right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; auto g = guess(mid); if (g == 0) return mid; else if (g == 1) left = mid + 1; else right = mid; } return -1; } };

item.title: 278. First Bad Version
item.description: // Forward declaration of isBadVersion API. bool isBadVersion(int version); class Solution { public: int firstBadVersion(int n) { int left = 1, right = n; while (left < right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (isBadVersion(mid)) right = mid; else left = mid + 1; } return right; } };

item.title: 34. Find First and Last Position of Element in Sorted Array
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<int> searchRange(vector<int>& nums, int target) { int left = 0, right = nums.size(); while (left < right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (nums[mid] < target) left = mid + 1; else right = mid; } if (right == nums.size() || nums[right] != target) return {-1, -1}; int l = right; left = 0, right = nums.size(); while (left < right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (nums[mid] <= target) left = mid + 1; else right = mid; } return {l, right - 1}; } };

item.title: 162. Find Peak Element
item.description: class Solution { public: int findPeakElement(vector<int>& nums) { int left = 0, right = nums.size() - 1; while (left < right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (nums[mid] < nums[mid + 1]) left = mid + 1; else right = mid; } return right; } };

item.title: 154. Find Minimum in Rotated Sorted Array II
item.description: class Solution { public: int findMin(vector<int>& nums) { int left = 0, right = nums.size() - 1; while (left < right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (nums[mid] > nums[right]) left = mid + 1; else if (nums[mid] < nums[right]) right = mid; else right -= 1; } return nums[right]; } };

item.title: 153. Find Minimum in Rotated Sorted Array
item.description: class Solution { public: int findMin(vector<int>& nums) { int left = 0, right = nums.size() - 1; while (left < right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (nums[mid] > nums[right]) left = mid + 1; else right = mid; } return nums[right]; } };

item.title: 81. Search in Rotated Sorted Array II
item.description: class Solution { public: bool search(vector<int>& nums, int target) { int left = 0, right = nums.size() - 1; while (left <= right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (target == nums[mid]) return true; if (nums[mid] < nums[right]) { if (target > nums[mid] && target <= nums[right]) left = mid + 1; else right = mid - 1; } else if (nums[mid] > nums[right]) { if (target >= nums[left] && target < nums[mid]) right = mid - 1; else left = mid + 1; } else right -= 1; } return false; } };

item.title: 33. Search in Rotated Sorted Array
item.description: class Solution { public: int search(vector<int>& nums, int target) { int left = 0, right = nums.size() - 1; while (left <= right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (nums[mid] == target) return mid; else if (nums[mid] < nums[right]) { if (target > nums[mid] && target <= nums[right]) left = mid + 1; else right = mid - 1; } else { if (target >= nums[left] && target < nums[mid]) right = mid - 1; else left = mid + 1; } } return -1; } };

item.title: 35. Search Insert Position
item.description: class Solution { public: int searchInsert(vector<int>& nums, int target) { int left = 0, right = nums.size(); while (left < right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (nums[mid] < target) left = mid + 1; else right = mid; } return right; } };

item.title: 107. Binary Tree Level Order Traversal II
item.description: /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: vector<vector<int>> levelOrderBottom(TreeNode* root) { vector<vector<int>> res; helper(root, 0, res); reverse(res.begin(), res.end()); return res; } void helper(TreeNode* root, int level, vector<vector<int>>& res) { if (!root) return; if (res.size() == level) res.push_back({}); res[level].push_back(root->val); if (root->left) helper(root->left, level+1, res); if (root->right) helper(root->right, level+1, res); } };

item.title: 103. Binary Tree Zigzag Level Order Traversal
item.description: /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: vector<vector<int>> zigzagLevelOrder(TreeNode* root) { vector<vector<int>> res; helper(root, 0, res); return res; } void helper(TreeNode* root, int level, vector<vector<int>>& res) { if (!root) return; if (res.size() == level) res.push_back({}); if (level & 1) res[level].insert(res[level].begin(), root->val); else res[level].

item.title: 102. Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
item.description: /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: vector<vector<int>> levelOrder(TreeNode* root) { vector<vector<int>> res; helper(root, 0, res); return res; } void helper(TreeNode* root, int level, vector<vector<int>>& res) { if (!root) return; if (res.size() == level) res.push_back({}); res[level].push_back(root->val); if (root->left) helper(root->left, level+1, res); if (root->right) helper(root->right, level+1, res); } };

item.title: 145. Binary Tree Postorder Traversal
item.description: /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: vector<int> postorderTraversal(TreeNode* root) { vector<int> res; stack<TreeNode*> s; auto p = root; while (!s.empty() || p) { if (p) { res.insert(res.begin(), p->val); s.push(p); p = p->right; } else { p = s.top(); s.pop(); p = p->left; } } return res; } };

item.title: 144. Binary Tree Preorder Traversal
item.description: /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: vector<int> preorderTraversal(TreeNode* root) { vector<int> res; stack<TreeNode*> s; auto p = root; while (!s.empty() || p) { if (p) { res.push_back(p->val); s.push(p); p = p->left; } else { p = s.top(); s.pop(); p = p->right; } } return res; } };

item.title: 94. Binary Tree Inorder Traversal
item.description: /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: vector<int> inorderTraversal(TreeNode* root) { vector<int> res; stack<TreeNode*> s; auto p = root; while (!s.empty() || p) { if (p) { s.push(p); p = p->left; } else { p = s.top(); s.pop(); res.push_back(p->val); p = p->right; } } return res; } };

item.title: 990. Satisfiability of Equality Equations
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<int> fa; int find(int x) { return x == fa[x] ? x : x = find(fa[x]); } bool equationsPossible(vector<string>& equations) { fa.resize(255); for (int i = 'a'; i <= 'z'; i++) fa[i] = i; for (auto e : equations) { auto f = e[0]; auto l = e[3]; if (e[1] == '=') fa[find(f)] = find(l); } for (auto e : equations) { if (e[1] == '!' && find(e[0]) == find(e[3])) return false; } return true; } };

item.title: 684. Redundant Connection
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<int> fa; int find(int a) { return a == fa[a] ? a : a = find(fa[a]); } vector<int> findRedundantConnection(vector<vector<int>>& edges) { auto N = edges.size(); fa.resize(N + 1); for (auto i = 1; i < N + 1; i++) { fa[i] = i; } int l, r; for (auto e : edges) { auto i_f = find(e[0]); auto j_f = find(e[1]); if (i_f != j_f) { fa[i_f] = j_f; } else { l = e[0]; r = e[1]; } } return vector<int>{l, r}; } };

item.title: 547. Friend Circles
item.description: union-find class Solution { public: vector<int> fa; int find(int x) { return x == fa[x] ? x : x = find(fa[x]); } int findCircleNum(vector<vector<int>>& M) { if (M.size() == 1) return 1; auto n = M.size(); auto ncircle = n; fa.resize(n); for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { fa[i] = i; } for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) for (int j = i; j < n; j++) { if (M[i][j] == 1) { auto i_f = find(i); auto j_f = find(j); if (i_f !

item.title: 435. Non-overlapping Intervals
item.description: greedy class Solution { public: int eraseOverlapIntervals(vector<vector<int>>& intervals) { if (intervals.size() == 0 || intervals.size() == 1) return 0; auto ans = 0; sort(intervals.begin(), intervals.end(), [](auto i, auto j){return i.front() < j.front();}); auto l = intervals[0][0]; auto r = intervals[0][1]; for (int i = 1; i< intervals.size(); i++) { if (r > intervals[i][0]) { ans++; r = min(r, intervals[i][1]); } else { l = intervals[i][0]; r = intervals[i][1]; } } return ans; } };

item.title: 56. Merge Intervals
item.description: greedy class Solution { public: vector<vector<int>> merge(vector<vector<int>>& intervals) { vector<vector<int>> result; if (intervals.size() == 0) return result; sort(intervals.begin(), intervals.end(), [](auto i, auto j) {return i.front() < j.front();}); auto left = intervals[0][0]; auto right = intervals[0][1]; for (int i = 1; i < intervals.size(); i++) { if (intervals[i][0] <= right) { right = max(right, intervals[i][1]); continue; } result.push_back(vector<int>{left, right}); left = intervals[i][0]; right = intervals[i][1]; } result.push_back(vector<int>{left, right}); return result; } };

item.title: 452. Minimum Number of Arrows to Burst Balloons
item.description: greedy class Solution { public: int findMinArrowShots(vector<vector<int>>& points) { auto len = points.size(); if (len == 0) { return 0; } sort(points.begin(), points.end(), [](auto p1, auto p2) {return p1.back() < p2.back();}); auto cur = points[0][1]; auto ans = 1; for (int i = 1; i < len; i++) { if (points[i][0] <= cur) { continue; } ans += 1; cur = points[i][1]; } return ans; } };

item.title: 75. Sort Colors
item.description: class Solution { public: void sortColors(vector<int>& nums) { if (nums.size() == 0) { return; } auto len = nums.size(); for (int i = 0; i < len;) { if (nums[i] == 0) { nums.insert(nums.begin(), 0); nums.erase(nums.begin() + i + 1); i += 1; } else if (nums[i] == 2) { nums.push_back(2); nums.erase(nums.begin() + i); int j = i; while (j < len && nums[j] == 2) { j++; } if (j == len) { break; } } else { i += 1; } } } };

item.title: 155. Min Stack
item.description: priority_queue, stack class MinStack { public: /** initialize your data structure here. */ stack<int> s; priority_queue<int, vector<int>, greater<int>> p; MinStack() { } void push(int x) { s.push(x); p.push(x); } void pop() { auto e = s.top(); s.pop(); vector<int> tmp; while (!p.empty()) { auto t = p.top(); p.pop(); if (t == e) break; tmp.push_back(t); } for (auto i : tmp) { p.push(i); } } int top() { return s.top(); } int getMin() { return p.

item.title: 171. Excel Sheet Column Number
item.description: long long class Solution { public: int titleToNumber(string s) { long long rtn = 0; for (auto i : s) { rtn = 26 * rtn + i - 'A' + 1; } return rtn; } };

item.title: 13. Roman to Integer
item.description: class Solution { public: int romanToInt(string s) { auto rtn = 0; auto l = s.size(); for (int i = 0; i < l;) { if (s[i] == 'I') { if (i + 1 < l && s[i + 1] == 'V') { rtn += 4; i += 1; } else if (i + 1 < l && s[i + 1] == 'X') { rtn += 9; i += 1; } else { rtn += 1; } } else if (s[i] == 'X') { if (i + 1 < l && s[i + 1] == 'L') { rtn += 40; i += 1; } else if (i + 1 < l && s[i + 1] == 'C') { rtn += 90; i += 1; } else { rtn += 10; } } else if (s[i] == 'C') { if (i + 1 < l && s[i + 1] == 'D') { rtn += 400; i += 1; } else if (i + 1 < l && s[i + 1] == 'M') { rtn += 900; i += 1; } else { rtn += 100; } } else if (s[i] == 'V') { rtn += 5; } else if (s[i] == 'L') { rtn += 50; } else if (s[i] == 'D') { rtn += 500; } else { rtn += 1000; } i += 1; } return rtn; } };

item.title: 69. Sqrt(x)
item.description: class Solution { public: int mySqrt(int x) { return floor(sqrt(x)); } };

item.title: 125. Valid Palindrome
item.description: class Solution { public: bool isPalindrome(string s) { string x = ""; for (auto i : s) { if (isalnum(i)) { x.push_back(tolower(i)); } } auto l = x.size(); if (l == 0) return true; for (int i = 0; i < l/2; i++) { if (x[i] != x[x.size() - 1 - i]) { return false; } } return true; } };

item.title: 20. Valid Parentheses
item.description: stack.empty() class Solution { public: bool isValid(string s) { if (s.size() == 0) return true; stack<char> brs; brs.push(s[0]); for (int i = 1; i < s.size(); i++) { switch(s[i]) { case ')': if (brs.empty() || brs.top() != '(') { return false; } brs.pop(); break; case '}': if (brs.empty() || brs.top() != '{') { return false; } brs.pop(); break; case ']': if (brs.empty() || brs.top() != '[') { return false; } brs.

item.title: 66. Plus One
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<int> plusOne(vector<int>& digits) { auto carry = 1; for (int i = digits.size() - 1; i >= 0; i--) { digits[i] += carry; carry = digits[i] == 10 ? 1 : 0; digits[i] %= 10; } if (carry) digits.insert(digits.begin(), carry); return digits; } };

item.title: 160. Intersection of Two Linked Lists
item.description: nice trick /** * Definition for singly-linked list. * struct ListNode { * int val; * ListNode *next; * ListNode(int x) : val(x), next(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: ListNode *getIntersectionNode(ListNode *headA, ListNode *headB) { if (headA == NULL || headB == NULL) { return NULL; } auto p = headA; auto q = headB; while (p != q) { p = p -> next; q = q -> next; if (p == q) return p; if (p == NULL) { p = headB; } if (q == NULL) { q = headA; } } return p; } };

item.title: 53. Maximum Subarray
item.description: class Solution { public: int maxSubArray(vector<int>& nums) { if (nums.size() == 0) return 0; if (nums.size() == 1) return nums[0]; int max_ = nums[0]; vector<int> sum; sum.push_back(nums[0]); for (int i = 1; i < nums.size(); i++) { auto tmp = nums[i] + (sum[i - 1] > 0 ? sum[i - 1] : 0); sum.push_back(tmp); max_ = max(max_, tmp); } return max_; } };

item.title: 14. Longest Common Prefix
item.description: class Solution { public: string longestCommonPrefix(vector<string>& strs) { if (strs.size() == 0) return ""; if (strs.size() == 1) return strs[0]; auto min_ = 1 << 30; for (auto str : strs) { min_ = min(min_, (int)str.size()); } for (auto j = min_; j > 0; j--) { auto tmp = strs[0].substr(0, j); auto i = 1; for (; i < strs.size(); i++) { if (strs[i].substr(0, j) != tmp) break; } if (i == strs.

item.title: 28. Implement strStr()
item.description: KMP? class Solution { public: int strStr(string haystack, string needle) { if (needle.size() == 0) return 0; if (haystack.size() < needle.size()) return -1; for (int i = 0; i < haystack.size() - needle.size() + 1; i++) { if (haystack[i] == needle[0]) { int j = 1; for (; j < needle.size(); j++) { if (haystack[i + j] != needle[j]) break; } if (j == needle.size()) { return i; } } } return -1; } };

item.title: 169. Majority Element
item.description: class Solution { public: int majorityElement(vector<int>& nums) { map<int, int> cnt; for (auto num : nums) { cnt[num] += 1; if (cnt[num] > nums.size() / 2) { return num; } } return -1; } };

item.title: 202. Happy Number
item.description: class Solution { public: int helper(int n) { int rtn = 0; while (n) { auto tmp = n % 10; rtn += tmp * tmp; n = (n - tmp) / 10; } return rtn; } bool isHappy(int n) { auto tmp = helper(n); set<int> nums; nums.insert(n); while (1) { if (tmp == 1) return true; if (nums.find(tmp) != nums.end()) return false; nums.insert(tmp); tmp = helper(tmp); } return false; } };

item.title: 217. Contains Duplicate
item.description: class Solution { public: bool containsDuplicate(vector<int>& nums) { map<int, bool> n; for (auto num: nums) { if (n[num]) { return true; } n[num] = true; } return false; } };

item.title: 204. Count Primes
item.description: class Solution { public: int countPrimes(int n) { if (n <= 2) { return 0; } vector<bool> nums(n, true); auto rtn = 1; for (int i = 2;;) { for (int j = 2 * i; j < n; j += i) { nums[j] = false; } while (!nums[++i] && i < n) { } if (i >= n) break; rtn += 1; } return rtn; } };

item.title: 189. Rotate Array
item.description: class Solution { public: void rotate(vector<int>& nums, int k) { for (int i = 0; i < k; i++) { auto tmp = nums.back(); nums.pop_back(); nums.insert(nums.begin(), tmp); } } };

item.title: 190. Reverse Bits
item.description: class Solution { public: uint32_t reverseBits(uint32_t n) { uint32_t rtn = 0; for (int i = 0; i < 32; i++) { rtn <<= 1; rtn |= (n >> i) & 1; } return rtn; } };

item.title: 191. Number of 1 Bits
item.description: class Solution { public: int hammingWeight(uint32_t n) { int rtn = 0; for (int i = 0; i <= 31; i++) { rtn += (n >> i) & 1; } return rtn; } };

item.title: 198. House Robber
item.description: dp class Solution { public: int rob(vector<int>& nums) { if (nums.size() == 0) { return 0; } vector<int> rob(nums.size() + 1, 0); rob[0] = 0, rob[1] = nums[0]; for (int i = 2; i <= nums.size(); i++) { rob[i] = max(rob[i - 2] + nums[i - 1], rob[i - 1]); } return rob[nums.size()]; } };

item.title: 141. Linked List Cycle
item.description: fast slow ptr /** * Definition for singly-linked list. * struct ListNode { * int val; * ListNode *next; * ListNode(int x) : val(x), next(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: bool hasCycle(ListNode *head) { if (head == NULL) { return false; } auto slow = head; auto fast = head; while (fast -> next != NULL && fast -> next -> next != NULL) { slow = slow -> next; fast = fast -> next -> next; if (slow == fast) { return true; } } return false; } };

item.title: 136. Single Number
item.description: class Solution { public: int singleNumber(vector<int>& nums) { int rtn = 0; for (auto num : nums) { rtn ^= num; } return rtn; } };

item.title: 121. Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
item.description: class Solution { public: int maxProfit(vector<int>& prices) { if (prices.size() == 0) { return 0; } int maxp = 0, minp = prices[0]; for (int i = 1; i < prices.size(); i++) { maxp = max(maxp, prices[i] - minp); minp = min(minp, prices[i]); } return maxp; } };

item.title: 118. Pascal's Triangle
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<vector<int>> generate(int numRows) { vector<vector<int>> result; for (int i = 1; i <= numRows; i++) { vector<int> cur(i, 1); if (i >= 3) { auto tmp = result.back(); for (int j = 1; j <= i - 2; j++) { cur[j] = tmp[j - 1] + tmp[j]; } } result.push_back(cur); } return result; } };

item.title: 108. Convert Sorted Array to Binary Search Tree

item.title: 104. Maximum Depth of Binary Tree
item.description: /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: int helper(TreeNode* root, int depth) { if (root == NULL) { return depth; } return max(helper(root->left, depth+1), helper(root->right, depth+1)); } int maxDepth(TreeNode* root) { return helper(root, 0); } };

item.title: 101. Symmetric Tree
item.description: recursively /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: bool helper(TreeNode* left, TreeNode* right) { if (left == NULL && right == NULL) { return true; } else if (left == NULL || right == NULL) { return false; } return left->val == right->val && helper(left->left, right->right) && helper(left->right, right->left); } bool isSymmetric(TreeNode* root) { if (root == NULL) { return true; } else return helper(root->left, root->right); } };

item.title: 387. First Unique Character in a String
item.description: class Solution { public: int firstUniqChar(string s) { int rep[256] = {0}; for (int i = 0; i < s.size(); i++) { rep[s[i]] += 1; } for (int i = 0; i < s.size(); i++) { if (rep[s[i]] == 1) return i; } return -1; } };

item.title: 1025. Divisor Game
item.description: dp class Solution { public: bool divisorGame(int N) { if (N == 1) return false; if (N == 2) return true; vector<bool> saved; saved.push_back(false); saved.push_back(true); for (int i = 3; i <= N; i++) { bool res = false; for (int j = 1; j * j < i; j++) { if (i % j == 0 && !saved[i - j - 1]) { res = true; break; } } saved.

item.title: 100. Same Tree
item.description: /** * Definition for a binary tree node. * struct TreeNode { * int val; * TreeNode *left; * TreeNode *right; * TreeNode(int x) : val(x), left(NULL), right(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: bool isSameTree(TreeNode* p, TreeNode* q) { if (p == NULL && q == NULL) return true; else if (p == NULL || q == NULL) return false; return (p->val == q->val) && isSameTree(p->left, q->left) && isSameTree(p->right, q->right); } };

item.title: 455. Assign Cookies
item.description: class Solution { public: int findContentChildren(vector<int>& g, vector<int>& s) { if (g.empty() || s.empty()) return 0; sort(g.begin(), g.end()); sort(s.begin(), s.end()); int rtn = 0; for (auto i = s.back();;) { auto j = g.back(); while (i < j) { g.pop_back(); if (g.empty()) break; j = g.back(); } if (!g.empty()) { rtn += 1; s.pop_back(); g.pop_back(); if (s.empty() || g.empty()) break; i = s.back(); } else { break; } } return rtn; } };

item.title: 326. Power of Three
item.description: class Solution { public: bool isPowerOfThree(int n) { return n > 0 ? !(1162261467 % n) : 0; } };

item.title: 268. Missing Number
item.description: class Solution { public: int missingNumber(vector<int>& nums) { auto len = nums.size(); auto sum = 0; for (auto num : nums) { sum += num; } return (len + 1) * len / 2 - sum; } };

item.title: 242. Valid Anagram
item.description: class Solution { public: bool isAnagram(string s, string t) { int cnts[255] = {0}; int cntt[255] = {0}; for (auto i : s) cnts[i] += 1; for (auto i : t) cntt[i] += 1; for (auto i = 'a'; i <= 'z'; i++) { if (cnts[i] != cntt[i]) return false; } return true; } };

item.title: 206. Reverse Linked List
item.description: iteratively /** * Definition for singly-linked list. * struct ListNode { * int val; * ListNode *next; * ListNode(int x) : val(x), next(NULL) {} * }; */ class Solution { public: ListNode* reverseList(ListNode* head) { ListNode* pre = NULL; while (head != NULL) { auto tmp = head->next; head->next = pre; pre = head; head = tmp; } return pre; } }; recursively class Solution { public: ListNode* reverseList(ListNode* head) { if (head == NULL || head -> next == NULL) return head; auto tmp = reverseList(head->next); head->next->next = head; head->next = NULL; return tmp; } };

item.title: 1154. Day of the Year
item.description: class Solution { public: bool isLeap(int year) { if (year % 100 == 0) return year % 400 == 0; else return year % 4 == 0; } int dayOfYear(string date) { auto year = stoi(date.substr(0, 4)); auto month = stoi(date.substr(5, 2)); auto day = stoi(date.substr(8)); vector<int> days{31, 28, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31}; if (isLeap(year)) days[1] = 29; auto rtn = 0; for (int i = 1; i < month; i++) rtn += days[i - 1]; rtn += day; return rtn; } };

item.title: 1137. N-th Tribonacci Number
item.description: class Solution { public: int tribonacci(int n) { int tri[38]; tri[0] = 0; tri[1] = 1; tri[2] = 1; for (int i = 3; i <= n; i++) { tri[i] = tri[i - 1] + tri[i - 2] + tri[i - 3]; } return tri[n]; } };

item.title: 1128. Number of Equivalent Domino Pairs
item.description: class Solution { public: int numEquivDominoPairs(vector<vector<int>>& dominoes) { int cnt[10][10] = {0}; for (auto dom : dominoes) { cnt[dom[0]][dom[1]] += 1; } int rtn = 0; for (int i = 1; i <= 9; i++) { for (int j = i; j <= 9; j++) { if (i == j) { auto tmp = cnt[i][j]; if (tmp >= 2) { rtn += tmp * (tmp - 1) / 2; } } else { auto tmp = (cnt[i][j] + cnt[j][i]); if (tmp >= 2) { rtn += tmp * (tmp - 1) /2; } } } } return rtn; } };

item.title: 1108. Defanging an IP Address
item.description: insert class Solution { public: string defangIPaddr(string address) { for (int i = 0; i < address.size(); i++) { if (address[i] == '.') { address.insert(address.begin() + i, '['); address.insert(address.begin() + i + 2, ']'); i += 2; } } return address; } };

item.title: 1103. Distribute Candies to People
item.description: math class Solution { public: vector<int> distributeCandies(int candies, int num_people) { int epoch = 0; for (; ; epoch++) { int needed = (epoch + 1) * num_people * ((epoch + 1) * num_people + 1) / 2; if (candies <= needed) break; } vector<int> result(num_people, 0); for (int i = 1; i <= num_people; i++) { result[i - 1] += epoch * i + num_people * epoch * (epoch - 1) / 2; } candies -= epoch * num_people * (epoch * num_people + 1) / 2; for (int i = 1; i <= num_people; i++) { int needed = i + epoch * num_people; if (candies <= needed) { result[i - 1] += candies; break; } else { result[i - 1] += needed; candies -= needed; } } return result; } };
